mentions.note: Surgical instruments and orthopedic leader at new lows; medical device sector facing structural headwind.
Expected consolidation with Zimmer Biomet never materialized; disappointing performer; won't sell but thesis broken.
Cramer admits wrong on consolidation thesis; expected Stryker to acquire/consolidate (e.g., Zimmer Biomet); didn't materialize; stock underperformed; 'real tough ride'.
